name: Daily LinkedIn post publisher from Notion
description: Fetches scheduled social media posts from a Notion database, uses Claude AI to polish and format the content for LinkedIn, and posts a ready-to-publish draft to Slack for review.

source.originalName: Automated Workflow for Daily LinkedIn Posts Using Notion

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for reading the content database

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the LinkedIn-ready draft

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the LinkedIn draft

notionDatabaseId.description: Notion database ID containing social media posts (must have Title, Content, Status, and ScheduledDate properties)

steps.name: Query Notion database for today's scheduled posts
Extract post content from Notion results
Build AI prompt for LinkedIn post optimization
Run Claude AI to optimize posts for LinkedIn
Build Slack Block Kit message with LinkedIn drafts
Post LinkedIn drafts to Slack for review
